title: How Elon Musk left OpenAI, according to Greg Brockman
summary: Greg Brockman recounts details of Elon Musk's departure from OpenAI, offering rare public insight into high-stakes negotiations between startup founders. The account highlights the internal dynamics at one of the world's most influential AI companies.
content: Cutthroat negotiations between startup founders are rarely shared so publicly, especially when a company becomes as world-changing as OpenAI.

zh.title: 根据格雷格·布罗克曼所述，埃隆·马斯克如何离开OpenAI
zh.summary: 格雷格·布罗克曼讲述了埃隆·马斯克离开OpenAI的细节，提供了对初创公司创始人之间高风险谈判的难得公开见解。该叙述突出了全球最具影响力的人工智能公司之一的内部动态。

title: DOJ says ransomware gang tapped into Russian government databases
summary: The U.S. Department of Justice has accused a ransomware gang of infiltrating Russian government databases, exploiting access to enable corruption and help gang leaders evade taxes and military service. The case highlights the intersection of cybercrime and geopolitical tensions.
content: U.S. prosecutors said a ransomware gang fueled Russian government corruption, and allowed the gang's leaders to avoid paying taxes and dodge the country's military draft.

zh.title: 美国司法部表示勒索软件团伙入侵了俄罗斯政府数据库
zh.summary: 美国司法部指控一个勒索软件团伙渗透了俄罗斯政府数据库，利用这种访问权限便利腐败行为并帮助团伙领导人逃避税收和兵役。该案件突出了网络犯罪与地缘政治紧张局势的交叉点。

title: AI evaluation startup Braintrust confirms breach, tells every customer to rotate sensitive keys
summary: Braintrust, a startup providing tools for AI engineers, disclosed a security breach affecting its Amazon cloud environment and instructed all customers to rotate their API keys. The incident underscores ongoing security vulnerabilities in cloud-hosted AI platforms.
content: Braintrust, a startup that makes an “operating system for engineers building AI software,” notified customers that hackers broke into one of its Amazon cloud environments, and is asking customers to rotate their API keys.

zh.title: 人工智能评估创业公司Braintrust确认泄露事件，要求每位客户轮换敏感密钥
zh.summary: 为人工智能工程师提供工具的初创公司Braintrust披露了影响其Amazon云环境的安全漏洞，并指示所有客户轮换其API密钥。该事件强调了云托管人工智能平台持续存在的安全漏洞。

title: What we’re hearing about the new homepage
summary: The Verge addressed user feedback on its recent homepage redesign, categorizing responses into issues requiring fixes (scrollbar placement, navigation links) and features under investigation (dark mode, personalization, date display on stories). The post demonstrates the outlet's commitment to iterative design based on reader input.
content:
We’ve been reading your feedback on the new homepage. All of it. The kind and encouraging comments, the brutal ones, the “actually this rules,” the “please undo this immediately,” the bug reports, the feature ideas, and yes, the eternal request for dark mode. We appreciate it.
A lot of you took the time to share detailed, thoughtful reactions right after launch, and that kind of feedback is useful. It helps us understand where the experience is landing or missing the mark, spot issues and friction, and ultimately sort that feedback into a few buckets. We want to be open and transparent with you about how we’re looking at those buckets of feedback.
Bucket 1: Yes, we should fix that. Some feedback points to things we should clearly fix or smooth out, like bugs and rough edges.
Feedback that falls into this bucket:
The scrollbar presence on the feed (✅ Fixed)
Adding “Read More” from the groups of stories when there’s something to link to (✅ Fixed)
Adding a way to read more from a category toward the bottom of the page (✅ Fixed)
Bucket 2: This is worth investigating. Some feedback points to things worth exploring further. These are repeated requests that may reflect a broader need or pain point, even if the exact proposed solution is not the one we ultimately pursue.
Feedback that falls into this bucket:
How the Latest feed is presented and engaged with, especially for those of you who love the pure revchron feed (which Latest is). 
Dark mode. We are actively working on this.
Dates on stories in curated story sets. Removing them was intentional so we could more easily bring older stories back to the forefront, especially when they can add color and context to a timely topic. But we hear the frustration here and are thinking about how to address the underlying pain point.
Marking a story as read vs. unread. This is a recurring request and speaks to a broader need for more personalized homepage experiences. That’s something we’re actively planning for, even if this exact

zh.title: 我们听到的关于新首页的反馈
zh.summary: The Verge 整理了用户对其最近首页重新设计的反馈，将其分为需要修复的问题（滚动条位置、导航链接）和正在调查的功能（深色模式、个性化、故事发布日期显示）。这篇文章展示了该媒体对基于读者反馈的迭代设计的承诺。

title: Mira Murati tells the court that she couldn’t trust Sam Altman’s words
summary: In testimony during the Musk v. Altman trial, OpenAI's former CTO Mira Murati stated under oath that CEO Sam Altman made false claims about the company's AI model safety review process. The deposition reveals internal tensions over safety protocols and leadership credibility at OpenAI.
content:
Mira Murati, OpenAI's former CTO, has testified under oath that CEO Sam Altman lied to her about the safety standards for a new AI model. In a video deposition shown during the ongoing Musk v. Altman trial on Wednesday, Murati said Altman falsely stated that OpenAI's legal department determined a new AI model did not need to go through the company's deployment safety board. "As you understand it, was Mr. Altman telling the truth when he made that statement to you?" Murati was asked in the deposition. "No," Murati said.
Murat said that during her tenure at OpenAI, Altman made her work more difficult. Her criticism "is completely management r …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 米拉·穆拉蒂在法庭作证称不相信山姆·奥特曼的言辞
zh.summary: 在马斯克诉奥特曼案的庭审中，OpenAI 前首席技术官米拉·穆拉蒂宣誓作证，称首席执行官山姆·奥特曼对公司 AI 模型安全审查流程做出了虚假陈述。该证词揭示了 OpenAI 内部在安全协议和领导力可信度方面的紧张关系。

title: SpaceX may spend up to $119B on ‘Terafab’ chip factory in Texas
summary: SpaceX is considering a major investment of up to $119 billion for a 'Terafab' semiconductor manufacturing facility in Texas, designed as a next-generation, vertically integrated chip production complex. The potential project underscores SpaceX's expansion beyond space exploration into advanced computing infrastructure.
content: The project would be a "multi-phase, next-generation, vertically integrated semiconductor manufacturing and advanced computing fabrication facility," according to the proposal.

zh.title: SpaceX 计划在德州投资最多 1190 亿美元建设"Terafab"芯片工厂
zh.summary: SpaceX 正在考虑为位于德州的"Terafab"半导体制造设施投入最多 1190 亿美元，该设施设计为新一代的垂直一体化芯片生产综合体。这个潜在项目彰显了 SpaceX 从太空探索向先进计算基础设施的扩张。

title: Here’s what Microsoft is offering long-serving employees to voluntarily retire
summary: Microsoft announced voluntary retirement packages for long-tenured U.S. employees whose combined age and years of service total 70 or more, including five years of healthcare coverage, severance pay, and six months of stock option vesting. The offering reflects broader workforce optimization strategies among major tech companies.
content:
Microsoft revealed last month that it's planning to offer long-serving employees in the US the ability to voluntarily retire. While the terms of the buyout were supposed to be announced to employees tomorrow, sources at Microsoft tell me the company has posted them on its internal HR website a little earlier than expected.
US employees whose combined years of service added to their age totals 70 or more will be eligible for voluntary retirement, and the package will include five years of access to Microsoft's healthcare coverage, a lump sum cash severance payment, and six months of vesting for unvested stock options.
The five years of medi …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软为长期员工提供自愿退休方案
zh.summary: 微软向美国长期员工推出自愿退休方案，适用于年龄与服务年限总和达到70年以上的员工，包括5年医疗保险覆盖、遣散费和6个月的股票期权加速归属。该举措反映了大型科技公司广泛采取的劳动力优化战略。

title: DeepSeek could hit $45B valuation from its first investment round
summary: Chinese AI laboratory DeepSeek could reach a $45 billion valuation in its first funding round, building on its 2025 emergence as a cost-efficient alternative to Western AI models. The company's success training large language models with significantly less computational resources challenges the assumption that AI dominance requires massive infrastructure investments.
content: The Chinese AI lab came to prominence in early 2025 after launching a large language model that trained on a fraction of the compute power and at a fraction of the cost of the big U.S. models like those from OpenAI and Anthropic.

zh.title: 深度求索首轮融资估值可能达到450亿美元
zh.summary: 中国人工智能实验室深度求索在首轮融资中估值可能达到450亿美元，基于其2025年作为西方AI模型成本高效替代品的崭露头角。该公司用显著较少的计算资源训练大型语言模型的成功，挑战了人工智能主导地位需要大规模基础设施投资的假设。

title: Report: SpaceX IPO gives Musk unchecked power and forbids investor lawsuits
summary: According to reports, SpaceX's proposed IPO structure would grant Elon Musk unchecked control while requiring investors to waive their legal right to sue the company. The arrangement raises questions about shareholder protections and governance standards for major public offerings.
content: Anyone who buys into SpaceX IPO must waive right to sue the firm, report says.

zh.title: 报道：SpaceX IPO赋予马斯克无限权力并禁止投资者诉讼
zh.summary: 根据报道，SpaceX提议的IPO结构将授予埃隆·马斯克无限制的控制权，同时要求投资者放弃对公司的诉讼权。该安排引发了对大型公开募股中股东保护和治理标准的质疑。

title: Google DeepMind partners with EVE Online for AI model testing
summary: Google DeepMind has partnered with EVE Online for AI model research and testing, coinciding with CCP Games' $120 million investment to achieve independence from its parent company and rebrand as Fenris Creations. The collaboration represents a significant opportunity for AI researchers to test algorithms in complex virtual environments.
content: Move comes as CCP Games spends $120M to go independent, rebrands as Fenris Creations.

zh.title: Google DeepMind与EVE Online合作进行AI模型测试
zh.summary: Google DeepMind已与EVE Online建立合作关系用于AI模型研究和测试，恰逢CCP Games获得1.2亿美元投资以实现独立于母公司并更名为Fenris Creations。该合作为AI研究人员在复杂虚拟环境中测试算法提供了重要机会。

title: The animated version of the iconic "Hello, world" image reveals striking new details
summary: An animated recreation of the iconic 'Hello, world' programming image has unveiled previously unnoticed details, particularly regarding satellite imagery elements within the composition. The discovery adds new layers of interpretation to one of computer science's most recognizable images.
content: What's going on with those satellites, anyway?

zh.title: 标志性"Hello, world"图像的动画版本揭示了惊人的新细节
zh.summary: 标志性"Hello, world"编程图像的动画复现揭示了之前未被注意到的细节，特别是关于构图中的卫星影像元素。这一发现为计算机科学最具标志性的图像增添了新的解释层面。

title: Native Instruments Komplete 26 adds weird new synths and experimental piano sounds
summary: Native Instruments released Komplete 26, the latest iteration of its music production bundle featuring 62 new instruments and tools including the experimental Absynth 6 synthesizer. Pricing ranges from $99 for select bundles to $1,949 for the Collector's Edition, with upgrade options available.
content:
Komplete is a complete music production bundle even if you don’t spend $2,000. | Image: Native Instruments	

The latest version of Native Instruments' Komplete music production bundle is here with 62 new additions, including the wonderfully weird Absynth 6. Komplete 26 comes in several flavors, starting with three $99 Select bundles: Beats, Band, and Electronic. Prices jump pretty steeply from there, with Standard costing $549, Ultimate costing $1,249, and the Collector's Edition priced at an eye-watering $1,949. You save some money if you're upgrading from Komplete 15 (and yes, they switched from sequential numbers to years for 2026), but upgrading the Collector's Edition will still set you back $399. 
Komplete 26 Standard should satisfy all but  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Native Instruments Komplete 26添加了奇怪的新合成器和实验性钢琴音色
zh.summary: Native Instruments发布了Komplete 26，其音乐制作包的最新版本，包含62个新乐器和工具，包括实验性Absynth 6合成器。定价从精选包的$99到Collector's Edition的$1,949不等，还提供升级选项。

title: The best beauty tech you can still grab in time for Mother’s Day
summary: The Verge compiled a Mother's Day gift guide featuring beauty and personal care technology products, ranging from professional-grade hair styling tools to FDA-cleared skin devices and affordable lip serums. The selection offers options across various budgets to help consumers find gifts that deliver both practical benefits and luxury experiences.
content:
If you’re looking to indulge mom this Mother’s Day, a gift that makes her feel a little more taken care of is a good place to start. Fortunately, if you’re looking for something to make her feel pampered, we know a thing or two about beauty tech, which can deliver on that front.
Some of the options below let your mom achieve professional-level results at home, including high-end tools that re-create salon blowouts and FDA-cleared devices that target signs of aging. Others are simpler and more practical, letting her freshen her hair without washing it or quickly touch up her roots with little to no hassle. There are also options to help her unwind, so she can ease tension after a long day or care for her hair as she sleeps. It’s called beauty rest, after all.
Below, we’ve rounded up a mix of Verge-approved picks that achieve all of the above and then some, regardless of your budget.
Shark FlexStyle Air Hair Styler and Dryer
The Shark FlexStyle Air is like getting multiple hair tools in one. It works as both a powerful hair dryer and a styling tool, with add-ons for curling, smoothing, and introducing volume. It’s lighter and often more affordable than comparable tools, but still delivers salon-like results at home for all types of hair.

Where to Buy:

 $349.99 $229 at Amazon
 $349.99 $229.99 at SharkNinja
 $349.99 $229.99 at Best Buy

Buxom Plump Shot Lip Serum
If mom wants fuller, smoother lips without injections, Buxom’s Plump Shot Lip Serum is the way to go. Made with hydrating ingredients like hyaluronic acid and jojoba oil, it smooths and visibly plumps lips in under a minute in a way that’s not over the top, while adding an attractive glossy sheen.

Where to Buy:

 $29 at Ulta
 $29 at Buxom
 $29 at Amazon

Medicube Booster Pro
The Hailey Bieber-backed Medicube Booster Pro is a glow wand specifically designed to improve your skin. It features four modes that use gentle electrical stimulation, light therapy, and sonic vibrations to help improve absorption, firm

zh.title: 母亲节前还能买到的最佳美容科技产品
zh.summary: 《The Verge》编制了一份母亲节礼物指南，介绍了美容和个人护理技术产品，包括专业级头发造型工具、FDA认证的皮肤护理设备和经济实惠的唇膏。该选择在各种预算范围内提供选项，帮助消费者找到既实用又奢华体验的礼物。

title: FDA vaccine studies censored by Trump admin after finding benefits of shots
summary: The Trump administration allegedly suppressed FDA studies demonstrating the benefits of COVID-19 vaccines and Shingrix shingles vaccine. The censorship raises concerns about how political pressure can impact the dissemination of public health research and vaccine confidence.
content: FDA has suppressed studies on COVID-19 vaccines and Shingrix, a shingles vaccine.

zh.title: FDA疫苗研究因发现接种益处而被特朗普政府审查
zh.summary: 特朗普政府据称压制了FDA关于COVID-19疫苗和带状疱疹疫苗Shingrix益处的研究。这种审查引发了人们对政治压力如何影响公共卫生研究传播和疫苗信心的关注。

title: Anthropic's Claude Managed Agents can now "dream," sort of
summary: Anthropic announced that Claude Managed Agents now support an extended thinking capability colloquially referred to as 'dreaming,' while also doubling usage limits for Claude Code Pro and Max subscribers from 5 hours to 10 hours. The updates enhance the capabilities and accessibility of Anthropic's AI tools.
content: Also, 5-hour usage limits will double for Pro and Max users of Claude Code.

zh.title: Anthropic的Claude托管代理现在可以"做梦"（某种程度上）
zh.summary: Anthropic宣布Claude托管代理现在支持扩展思维能力，俗称"做梦"，同时将Claude Code Pro和Max订户的使用限制从5小时增加到10小时。这些更新增强了Anthropic AI工具的功能和可访问性。

title: reMarkable’s new Paper Pure tablet goes back to basics with a monochrome screen
summary: reMarkable has released the Paper Pure, a lighter and faster successor to the six-year-old Remarkable 2 that maintains the monochrome e-ink screen approach. The new tablet represents the company's commitment to the original note-taking experience over color options.
content: The new Paper Pure is lighter and faster than the reMarkable 2, which is going to be retired six years since its launch.

zh.title: reMarkable的新款Paper Pure平板回归基础，采用单色屏幕
zh.summary: reMarkable推出了Paper Pure，这是六年前推出的Remarkable 2的更轻更快的继承者，保持了单色电子墨水屏的设计方法。新平板代表了该公司对原始笔记体验的承诺，而非彩色选项。

title: The Remarkable Paper Pure is the best digital notepad I’ve ever used
summary: The Verge's review finds the Remarkable Paper Pure delivers an exceptional pen-on-paper writing experience through its textured e-ink display and improved stylus, with upgrades including a faster processor, doubled RAM to 2GB, and increased storage to 32GB. Despite similar latency to the Remarkable 2, the writing feel remains superior to competitors including the Apple Pencil Pro.
content:
Was I writing with pen and paper, or a stylus on a tablet? It’s getting more difficult than ever to tell. 
The Remarkable Paper Pure is a follow-up to 2020’s Remarkable 2 and a couple of premium color E Ink tablets. As with Remarkable’s first two digital notepads, the Paper Pure features a black-and-white E Ink screen that sacrifices lighting for writing. The screen’s textured finish feels more like writing on actual paper than a tablet with a smooth glass screen. Without lighting, you can’t use it everywhere. But that tradeoff is important. Every stroke seems directly connected to the tip of the Marker as a result, making it feel more like you’re using an actual pen on a piece of paper rather than a stylus on a screen. It’s better than anything I’ve tested so far.
So how about that pen? The Pure comes with a basic battery-powered stylus called the Marker, but I tested the more expensive Marker Plus that adds a dedicated eraser button and is available as part of a more expensive $449 bundle that also includes a new Sleeve Folio case. Its latency is the same as the Remarkable 2’s stylus and not as responsive as the Apple Pencil Pro, but I think the writing experience with Remarkable’s tablets remains unmatched. It’s nice that the stylus can wirelessly charge when attached to the side of the tablet, like the iPad Pro and Air. It’s no thicker than the Remarkable 2’s stylus and attaches more securely than before.
There are some other upgrades. The Paper Pure has a faster dual-core processor, a bump from 1GB of RAM to 2GB, and a storage increase from 8GB to 32GB. Comparing the two tablets side by side, the Paper Pure is faster when it comes to navigating the UI and opening documents, but not significantly. While large ebooks and PDFs opened about half a second faster on the Paper Pure, the speed improvements were less than that for other documents, including its native notebooks.
Remarkable Paper Pure

Where to Buy:

 $399 at Remarkable
 $449 at Remarkable (bundle)

Rema

zh.title: Remarkable Paper Pure是我用过的最好的数字笔记本
zh.summary: The Verge的评测发现Remarkable Paper Pure通过纹理化的电子墨水显示屏和改进的手写笔提供了非凡的笔纸书写体验，升级包括更快的处理器、RAM翻倍至2GB，以及存储容量增至32GB。尽管延迟与Remarkable 2相似，但书写体验仍然优于包括Apple Pencil Pro在内的竞争对手。

title: Remarkable’s next E Ink digital notepad skips the color screen
summary: Remarkable's Paper Pure ditches the color e-ink screens of recent Pro models, returning to a refined black-and-white display similar to the Remarkable 2 launched six years ago. The new design delivers twice the speed improvements for navigation, zooming, and page turning.
content:
Remarkable announced a new paper tablet today - albeit one without the advanced color screen found in its recent Paper Pro and Paper Pro Move tablets. The new Remarkable Paper Pure instead features an upgraded version of the black-and-white E Ink display found in the Remarkable 2 that launched over six years ago, and once again skips any screen lighting. Thanks to the new display and under-the-hood upgrades, the company says the Paper Pure is twice as fast at "navigating, zooming, and turning pages" when compared to the Remarkable 2.
The Remarkable Paper Pure is available for preorder today for $399 through the company's online store, with  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Remarkable的下一款E Ink数字笔记本放弃了彩色屏幕
zh.summary: Remarkable的Paper Pure放弃了最近Pro型号的彩色电子墨水屏，回归到类似于六年前推出的Remarkable 2的精致黑白显示。新设计在导航、缩放和翻页方面实现了两倍的速度改进。

title: Energizer’s new coin batteries won’t cause ingestion burns if swallowed
summary: Energizer has launched its Ultimate Child Shield line of lithium coin batteries, claiming to be the world's first to eliminate ingestion burn risks if swallowed. The batteries are available in three common sizes (2032, 2025, 2016) used in devices like remotes, wearables, and Apple AirTags.
content:
The safer coin batteries are available in 2032, 2025, and 2016 varieties. | Image: Energizer	

Energizer has announced a new line of lithium coin batteries it claims are the world's first to eliminate the risk of ingestion burns if swallowed. Its Ultimate Child Shield line includes three sizes available starting today - 2032, 2025, and 2016 - that are commonly used in devices like remotes, wearables, and trackers such as Apple's AirTags.
Most swallowed batteries pass right through the body's digestive system without causing any harm. But if one gets stuck in the esophagus, there's a risk of it being more than a choking hazard. When the battery makes contact with saliva, it can generate an electrical current, resulting in chemical rea …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 劲量推出新型纽扣电池，吞咽后不会造成灼伤
zh.summary: 劲量公司推出了Ultimate Child Shield系列锂纽扣电池，声称是全球首款如果被吞咽不会造成灼伤风险的电池。这些电池有三种常见规格（2032、2025、2016），广泛用于遥控器、可穿戴设备和Apple AirTags等装置中。

title: Microsoft’s Office and LinkedIn chief now runs Teams in latest reshuffle
summary: Ryan Roslansky, Microsoft's LinkedIn chief who took over Office last year, is now expanding his responsibilities to lead a new Work Experiences Group that includes the Teams organization. The reshuffle follows the retirement of Rajesh Jha, who led the experiences and devices group for over 35 years.
content:
Microsoft's LinkedIn chief, Ryan Roslansky, took on an expanded role at the company as head of Office last year, and he's now getting more responsibilities as part of the latest leadership reshuffle inside Microsoft. Sources tell me that the Microsoft Teams organization is moving to report to Roslansky, who will now lead a new Work Experiences Group at Microsoft.
The changes, which come a week after Roslansky named a new CEO of LinkedIn, are part of a broader reshuffle triggered by Rajesh Jha, executive vice president of Microsoft's experiences and devices group, retiring from Microsoft after more than 35 years. Jha was responsible for the  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软Office和LinkedIn首席执行官现在也掌管Teams
zh.summary: 在去年接管Office的微软LinkedIn首席执行官瑞恩·罗斯兰斯基，现在进一步扩大职责范围，领导包括Teams在内的新工作体验部门。此次改组发生在领导了35年多体验和设备部门的拉杰什·贾退休之后。

title: The clippening
summary: After leaving his FBI role in January, Dan Bongino is returning to podcasting with The Dan Bongino Show, using social media accounts called "clippers" as an experimental promotional tactic to distribute short clips across platforms. Clippers are largely anonymous accounts designed to amplify content reach beyond traditional audiences.
content:
Earlier this year, after a tumultuous period serving as the former second-in-command at the FBI, Dan Bongino went back to what he is perhaps known best for: video podcasting. After Bongino exited the role in January, he began promotion for the return of his podcast, The Dan Bongino Show. He bought out a billboard in Times Square in New York; he dropped teaser videos for his first new episode in months. Bongino also deployed a more experimental promotional tactic, aimed at getting portions of his show in front of a wider audience. For this, he used clippers.
Clippers are largely anonymous social media accounts whose sole purpose is to rack …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 短视频剪辑潮
zh.summary: 在今年1月离开FBI后，丹·博吉诺正在回归播客，推出《丹·博吉诺秀》，使用被称为"剪辑者"的社交媒体账户进行试验性推广，在各平台分发短视频。剪辑者账户大多是匿名的，旨在扩大内容影响力，超越传统受众范围。

title: Chrome’s AI features may be hogging 4GB of your computer storage
summary: Google Chrome is automatically downloading a 4GB Gemini Nano AI model file to users' browser folders when certain AI features are enabled, causing unexpected storage depletion. The weights.bin file powers Chrome's AI tools including scam detection, writing assistance, and autofill features.
content:
Google Chrome may be taking up more of your storage than expected thanks to a large on-device AI model file that, in some cases, is being automatically downloaded to the browser's system folders. Users who have noticed unexplained drops in their available desktop device storage are now discovering that Chrome is installing a 4GB weights.bin file inside their browser directory when certain AI features are enabled.
The weights.bin file in question is connected to Google's Gemini Nano AI model, which powers Chrome AI tools like scam detection, writing assistance, autofill, and suggestion features. As the Gemini Nano model is designed to run lo …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Chrome的AI功能可能占用4GB的电脑存储空间
zh.summary: 当启用某些AI功能时，Google Chrome会自动将一个4GB的Gemini Nano AI模型文件下载到用户的浏览器文件夹，导致存储空间意外耗尽。weights.bin文件为Chrome的AI工具提供支持，包括诈骗检测、写作协助和自动填充功能。

title: Peter Sarlin’s QuTwo reaches $380M valuation in angel round
summary: Finnish AI lab QuTwo, founded by former AMD Silo AI CEO Peter Sarlin, has reached a €325 million ($380 million) valuation following a €25 million angel round. The funding reflects strong investor confidence in AI, quantum computing, and European sovereign technology development.
content: QyTw0, the Finnish AI lab founded by former AMD Silo AI CEO Peter Sarlin, is now valued at €325 million (approximately $380 million) after raising a €25 million angel round ($29 million). It's a sign of enduring tailwinds for AI, quantum computing, and sovereign tech, especially for Europe-made companies.

zh.title: 彼得·萨林的QuTwo在天使轮融资中估值达3.8亿美元
zh.summary: 由前AMD Silo AI首席执行官彼得·萨林创立的芬兰AI实验室QuTwo，在获得2500万欧元的天使轮融资后，估值达到3.25亿欧元（3.8亿美元）。这笔融资反映了投资者对人工智能、量子计算和欧洲主权技术发展的强烈信心。

title: Marc Lore says that AI will soon enable anyone open a restaurant
summary: Wonder plans to leverage AI-powered robotic kitchens to create "restaurant factories," enabling entrepreneurs to launch virtual food brands through simple prompts. The initiative demonstrates AI's expanding role in food service automation and entrepreneurship.
content: Wonder wants to turn its robotic kitchens into AI-powered “restaurant factories,” letting anyone spin up a virtual food brand with a prompt.

zh.title: 马克·洛尔表示AI将很快使任何人都能开餐厅
zh.summary: Wonder计划利用AI驱动的机器人厨房创建"餐厅工厂"，使创业者能够通过简单的提示启动虚拟食品品牌。该举措展示了AI在食品服务自动化和创业中不断扩大的作用。

title: Nuro receives driverless testing permit ahead of Uber robotaxi service launch
summary: Nuro, a Silicon Valley autonomous vehicle startup, has received a permit to conduct driverless testing, marking a significant milestone ahead of potential support for Uber's robotaxi service expansion.
content: The Silicon Valley AV startup has not started driverless testing yet.

zh.title: Nuro在Uber无人出租车服务推出前获得无人驾驶测试许可证
zh.summary: 硅谷自动驾驶汽车初创公司Nuro获得了进行无人驾驶测试的许可证，这标志着在可能支持Uber无人出租车服务扩展之前的一个重要里程碑。
